title: Aberration
description: This short story horror map takes place in a motel late at night, but soon you discover that this hotel isn't as normal as you thought.
body:
# ABERRATION **Story**
You are driving late at night and need to find a place to rest. You find a simple motel that should be good enough for the night, though this motel is not what you were expecting.

**Settings**
It is recomended that you keep the resource pack, shader, and settings the same as the modpacks defaults. You may change keybinds and sensitivity to your prefrences.

**Good to Knows**
You can interact with certain objects in the game (like lanterns) with right click, or whatever you bind the use button to.
Certain trapdoors can be opened while decorative ones can't.

**Mods/Resource packs**
This mod comes with optimization mods, Autohud, and No Resource Pack Warnings. There is a resource pack that adds custom sounds but will only affect the map that comes with the modpack. You can still join your favorite minecraft servers and friends without having to remove/disable any mods.
